method: source audit plus test discovery plus focused route/action Jest commands recorded in APS-E018 and APS-E019

claims.claim: Authentication/session/login/signup behavior is documented from source evidence.
claims.citation: APS-E001, APS-E002, APS-E003, APS-E004, APS-E005, APS-E006

claims.claim: Verification and password recovery behavior is documented from source evidence.
Profile, settings, saved listings, favorites, saved searches, and data-model claims are documented from source evidence.
claims.citation: APS-E010, APS-E011, APS-E012, APS-E013, APS-E014, APS-E015, APS-E016

claims.claim: Browser/runtime behavior and focused tests have been verified.
claims.citation: runtime-verification.md; APS-E018, APS-E019, APS-G001, APS-G002, APS-G003
claims.discrepancy: Focused route/action Jest coverage passed in APS-E018 and APS-E019, but browser, provider-runtime, and optional live HTTP transport parity remain unverified.
claims.recommendedFix: Run the browser/provider checks in 11-test-traceability-matrix.md and optionally add live HTTP transport parity coverage.

claims.claim: Account deletion retention expectations are verified against product/legal requirements.
claims.discrepancy: Source tombstone behavior is documented, but product/legal retention requirements were not verified.
claims.recommendedFix: Review account deletion behavior with product/legal policy owners and update 12-gaps-unknowns-and-questions.md.

coverageGaps.gap: Full browser auth/profile/settings/saved-listings/saved-searches suite was not run.
Focused route/action status, CSRF, and auth/favorites private no-store checks passed in APS-E019. Optional live HTTP transport parity remains unrun.
Google OAuth, Turnstile, email delivery, and checkout return behavior were not runtime verified.
Policy/legal expectations for retained records were not verified beyond source behavior.
Saved-search alert paywall and checkout fulfillment are source-observed but not payment-runtime verified.
